understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) to win the level by navigating a tile grid with horizontal movement and gravity-driven falling.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x, then gravity automatically pulls the player vertically (here DOWN, decreasing y) until landing on a solid tile. CLICK removes breakable blocks at target coordinates without moving the player. Hazards like spikes cause instant loss. UNDO reverts the last action. Gravity direction determines fall path; clicks can open new fall paths.
